title: oenothera grisea
intro: Oenothera grisea, also known as Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its delicate white to pale yellow flowers and a sprawling habit. The roots and seeds of the Oenothera grisea plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oenothera grisea include reducing symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), alleviating menopausal symptoms, and supporting heart health due to its high levels of omega-6 fatty acids. Oenothera grisea is often prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or capsule, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves for skin conditions.
